subcodes.first_line: The atoms themselves bear witness, even as doth My tongue in My prison, that there is none other God but Me, the All-Speaking, the All-Knowing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد شهدت الذرات بما شهد لسانی فی سجنی انه لا اله الا انا الناطق العلیم قد
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world
